title: Dashboard loads and shows summary statistics and recent documents
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see key summary cards and a recent documents section.

title: Dashboard quick link to Documents list works
description: Verifies the dashboard provides a working navigation path to the Documents list page.

title: Dashboard quick link to Approvals works
description: Verifies the dashboard provides a working navigation path to the Approvals page.

title: Cancel out of the upload wizard and return to Documents list without submitting
description: Verifies the user can exit the wizard using a cancel/back control and is returned to /documents.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Click the "Cancel" or "Back to Documents" button/link

title: Ensure Submit is blocked when no file is selected
description: Verifies the wizard does not allow submission without selecting a file and shows a visible error state/message.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Select any available option from the Branch dropdown

title: Filter documents by category chip and status, then toggle views
description: Verifies that a user can filter the documents list by category and status and switch between table and grid views while keeping the filtered results visible.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation

title: Apply category chip filter (e.g., PO) and verify list updates
description: Verifies that selecting a category chip filters the visible documents list.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation

title: Apply status dropdown filter (e.g., PENDING) and verify list updates
description: Verifies that selecting a status from the status dropdown filters the visible documents list.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation

title: Combine category and status filters and verify filtered results persist after toggling view
description: Verifies that using both category and status filters together narrows results and that switching between table and grid views does not reset filters.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation

title: Toggle to grid view and confirm grid layout is displayed
description: Verifies that the user can switch from table view to grid view and the grid presentation is visible.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation

title: Toggle to table view and confirm table layout is displayed
description: Verifies that the user can switch to table view and the table presentation is visible.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation

title: Approve & Sign a document and see approval stepper update
description: Verifies that a user can approve a document with an optional comment and the approval chain updates to APPROVED.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Click on a document name in the documents list

title: Approve & Sign with optional comment and confirm success state is visible
description: Verifies the approve confirmation flow including entering a comment and seeing an approved status in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Click on a document name in the documents list
Type "Approved by UI test" into the comment field

title: Approve & Sign confirm updates approval step to APPROVED (and unlocks next step or completes document)
description: Verifies that confirming approval updates the approval stepper and overall state shows approved progression.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Click on a document name in the documents list

title: Reject a document with optional comment and confirm status becomes REJECTED
description: Verifies the reject flow and that the document status visibly updates to REJECTED and approvals stop.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Click on a document name in the documents list
Type "Rejecting for UI test" into the comment field

title: Reject confirm shows REJECTED state in approval chain and/or document header
description: Verifies that after confirming reject, the UI shows REJECTED and the approval chain indicates it is stopped.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Click on a document name in the documents list

title: Approve & Sign when signature stamp is unavailable shows 'Approved without stamp' notification
description: Verifies that approving without signature image or keyword mapping succeeds and shows the 'Approved without stamp' message.

steps.description: Click on "Documents" in the main navigation
Click on a document name in the documents list
Verify text "Approved without stamp" is visible

title: Pending approval can be approved and moves to Completed
description: Verifies an approver can open a pending approval, approve it from the document detail page, and then see it removed from Pending and present in Completed.

title: Open a pending approval item to reach its document detail page
description: Verifies selecting a pending approval item opens its corresponding document detail page.

steps.description: Click the first approval item in the "Pending" list

title: Reject a pending approval and verify it appears in Completed
description: Verifies an approver can reject a pending approval and then see it no longer in Pending and listed in Completed.

steps.description: Click the first approval item in the "Pending" list

title: Delegated tab is accessible and shows delegated approvals list
description: Verifies the user can switch to the Delegated tab and view delegated approvals when available.

title: Open a delegated approval item to reach its document detail page
description: Verifies selecting a delegated approval item opens its corresponding document detail page.

steps.description: Click the first approval item in the delegated list

title: Completed tab is accessible and shows completed approvals list
description: Verifies the user can switch to the Completed tab and view completed approvals when available.

title: Pending tab empty state is shown when there are no pending approvals
description: Verifies the Pending tab shows the empty state message when no approvals are assigned.

steps.description: Verify text "No pending approvals" is visible

title: Create a new user with required fields and verify it appears in the users list
description: Verifies an admin can create a user by providing required fields and then see the user in the list.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Click on "Users" in the admin navigation
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Show validation errors when attempting to create a user with required fields blank
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents saving a new user when mandatory inputs are empty.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Click on "Users" in the admin navigation
Verify text "Name is required" is visible
Verify text "Email is required" is visible
Verify text "Role is required" is visible
Verify text "Branch is required" is visible

title: Cancel out of Create User without creating a user
description: Verifies an admin can exit the create-user flow without saving and returns to the users list.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Click on "Users" in the admin navigation

title: Prevent creating a user with an invalid email format
description: Verifies email format validation blocks saving a user when email is not valid.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Click on "Users" in the admin navigation
Type "Invalid Email User" into the name field

title: Verify users list page loads and core columns are visible
description: Verifies the admin users list page renders and shows expected list structure for managing accounts.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Click on "Users" in the admin navigation

title: Signatures page loads and shows users list with upload actions
description: Verifies the signatures management page renders and exposes upload controls for admins.

title: Edit workflow steps and save successfully for a selected Category and Branch
description: Verifies an admin can select a Category and Branch, modify workflow steps, save, and see a success confirmation with the updated steps visible.

title: Select Category and Branch then add a workflow step and save
description: Verifies adding a new role/step to an existing workflow can be saved and is visible afterward for the same Category and Branch.

steps.description: Select a Category from the Category dropdown
Select a Branch from the Branch dropdown

title: Add a workflow step and confirm success message on Save
description: Verifies the Save action shows a visible confirmation message after adding a step to the workflow.

steps.description: Select a Category from the Category dropdown
Select a Branch from the Branch dropdown

title: Remove a workflow step and save successfully (workflow remains non-empty)
description: Verifies an admin can remove a role/step (leaving at least one step) and save successfully with updated steps shown.

steps.description: Select a Category from the Category dropdown
Select a Branch from the Branch dropdown

title: Attempt to save an empty workflow and see validation error
description: Verifies saving with zero workflow steps is blocked and shows the validation error "Workflow must contain at least one step".

steps.description: Select a Category from the Category dropdown
Select a Branch from the Branch dropdown

title: Validation error persists until workflow has at least one step
description: Verifies the empty-workflow validation error is shown on Save, and after adding one step, Save succeeds with a confirmation visible.

steps.description: Select a Category from the Category dropdown
Select a Branch from the Branch dropdown
Verify text "Workflow must contain at least one step" is visible

title: Switch Category or Branch updates the displayed workflow steps
description: Verifies changing the selected Category and/or Branch updates the workflow steps shown on the page.

steps.description: Select a Category from the Category dropdown
Select a Branch from the Branch dropdown

title: Create a new keyword mapping and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies an admin can create a Category + Role keyword mapping with keyword and position hint and then see it listed.

steps.description: Click the "Keyword Mappings" item in the admin navigation
Type "Bottom-right" into the Position Hint field

title: Validation: keyword is required when creating a mapping
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving a mapping when the keyword field is empty and shows the required validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Keyword Mappings" item in the admin navigation
Type "Top-left" into the Position Hint field
Verify text "Keyword is required" is visible

title: Cancel mapping creation leaves list unchanged (no new keyword shown)
description: Verifies an admin can cancel out of the create mapping flow without saving a new mapping.

steps.description: Click the "Keyword Mappings" item in the admin navigation

title: Create mapping with trimmed keyword (leading/trailing spaces)
description: Verifies the system accepts a keyword with surrounding spaces and displays it cleanly in the list.

steps.description: Click the "Keyword Mappings" item in the admin navigation
Type "  TRIM_TEST  " into the Keyword field
Type "Center" into the Position Hint field

title: Prevent duplicate mapping for same Category + Role (error or block save)
description: Verifies the UI handles attempting to create a duplicate mapping for the same Category and Role by showing an error or preventing save.

steps.description: Click the "Keyword Mappings" item in the admin navigation
Type "Bottom" into the Position Hint field
Type "Top" into the Position Hint field

title: Validation: saving with missing required dropdown selection shows an error
description: Verifies the UI shows a validation message when required Category or Role is not selected before saving.

steps.description: Click the "Keyword Mappings" item in the admin navigation
Verify text "Category is required" is visible

title: Activate absence delegation for a user and verify it appears on the user card
description: Verifies an admin can set an absence period with a delegate and sees the delegation shown as active on the selected user card.

steps.description: Click "Absence Delegation" in the admin navigation/menu
Click "Set Absence" on a user card

title: Save absence delegation with valid delegate and dates
description: Verifies the Set Absence form accepts a valid delegate and start/end dates and can be saved successfully.

steps.description: Click "Absence Delegation" in the admin navigation/menu
Click "Set Absence" on a user card
Select a valid user from the "Delegated to" dropdown

title: Delegation becomes active and visible on the user card after saving
description: Verifies that after saving absence delegation, the UI shows an active delegation status on the same user card.

steps.description: Click "Absence Delegation" in the admin navigation/menu
Click "Set Absence" on a user card
Select a valid user from the "Delegated to" dropdown

title: Verify active delegation status details are visible on card
description: Verifies that the active delegation indicator and key details (delegate and dates) are visibly presented on the user card.

steps.description: Click "Absence Delegation" in the admin navigation/menu
Verify text "Active" is visible on at least one user card
Verify text "Delegated to" is visible on the same card area
Verify text "Start" is visible on the same card area

title: Delegated approvals are visible in the delegate’s Approvals page (Delegated tab)
description: Verifies that a delegate user can see delegated approvals in the Approvals area under the Delegated tab after delegation is active.

title: Show error when an invalid delegate is selected
description: Verifies the system blocks saving when the delegate selection is invalid and shows the specified validation error message.

steps.description: Click "Absence Delegation" in the admin navigation/menu
Click "Set Absence" on a user card
Select "Invalid user" from the "Delegated to" dropdown

title: Prevent saving when end date is earlier than start date
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when the selected absence end date precedes the start date and shows an on-screen validation message.

steps.description: Click "Absence Delegation" in the admin navigation/menu
Click "Set Absence" on a user card

title: Cancel/close Set Absence without saving does not change the card
description: Verifies that closing the Set Absence dialog/form without saving leaves the user card unchanged (no new active delegation shown).

steps.description: Click "Absence Delegation" in the admin navigation/menu
Click "Set Absence" on a user card
Verify text "Set Absence" is not visible

title: Save profile changes (display name) successfully
description: Verifies a user can update their display name in Settings and sees a success confirmation with updated values visible.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the main navigation/menu
